div.p: Compute hash → Get bucket sentinel → Traverse list → CAS insert
Legend: 🟠 Sentinel nodes (mark bucket boundaries) 🟢 Inserted node (result of this operation) 🔴 CAS operation (linearization point) 🔵 Hazard pointer protection required
Check if bucket 5 sentinel exists sentinel = buckets[5].sentinel

ul.li: Points into list at bucket 5 position

ol.li: S7.so_key > target.so_key → STOP Position found: insert between K2 and S7

div.p: CAS SUCCESS ✓ Linearization point! K2->next now points to new_node Element is visible to all threads
CAS FAIL ✗ Another thread modified list → Retry from Step 3 → Reload prev, curr → Use observed value
During traversal, if: curr->so_key == target_so_key AND eq_fn(curr->key, user_key)
Slot 0: prev node Slot 1: curr node Set-then-validate protocol:
